items.name: Leave the four cursed chests closed
items.location: Lowtown · Palace cellar · Nalbina · Phon Coast

route.why: Opening ANY of these four chests silently deletes the Zodiac Spear from the game

items.notes: Never open: the chest outside Old Dalan's place in Lowtown, the palace treasury cellar chests during the heist, the Confiscatory in Nalbina's dungeons, and the beach chest cluster on the Phon Coast. Mark this collected once you're past each without touching them.

items.name: Zodiac Spear

route.why: The strongest weapon in the game, in a plain unguarded chest — if you kept the pact

items.notes: Enter Nabudis through the Salikawood's northeast gate. The chest sits in the Cloister of the Highborn.

items.name: Adrammelech
items.notes: The Wroth reachable from Ogir-Yensa's sinkholes. Undead swarm the arena — bring Curaja or phoenix downs to weaponize.

items.name: Zalera
items.notes: Finish the Dantro's Wife errand chain along the Nebra to earn the Barheim Key, then return to the deep tunnels.

items.name: Cúchulainn
items.notes: The White Mousse hunt yields the Sluice Gate Key; drain the right channels to reach the Impure. The gate puzzle is the real boss.

items.name: Exodus
items.notes: Free the shrine stones (weather-dependent floating paths) to reach the Judge-Sal.

items.name: Chaos
items.notes: The three medallions quest (Nabreus Deadlands relics) opens the sealed doors. Fought with magick only — Silence is death.

items.name: Zeromus
items.notes: An acolyte on Mt Bur-Omisace hands over the Stone of the Condemner late in the story; use it at the shrine's waystone. No MP inside.

items.name: Ultima
items.notes: The unmapped waystone maze above Giruvegan. Bring patience and a pen — the High Seraph waits at the top.

items.name: Zodiark
items.notes: Speak with the Geomancer in Jahara once most espers are claimed to open the special charter shaft. The hardest fight on this list.

items.name: Clan hunts & Montblanc's board

route.why: Sign with Clan Centurio early — hunts gate half the endgame

items.notes: Petitioner boards refresh as the story advances. Several petitioners vanish into later story states — clear the board when you can.

items.name: Phon Coast Hunt Club
items.notes: Thirty rare game trophies split between three brothers. How you split them decides the shop's stock — favor one brother deliberately.

items.name: Gilgamesh
items.notes: Two duels deep in the mines (Site 7 needs the site key). He brings every famous sword that isn't real.

items.name: Genji gear (steal from Gilgamesh)
items.notes: Glove, armor, helm and shield are STEAL-ONLY across the two fights — kill him without stealing and the set is gone. Steal at each health threshold.

items.name: Omega Mark XII
items.notes: Hidden in the crystal's second ascent. Drops nothing you need; exists to prove a point.

items.name: Yiazmat
items.notes: Unlocks after the rest of the board is clear. Fifty million HP. Bring a book.
